description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved inotuzumab ozogamicin for reimbursement as a monotherapy treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with relapsed or refractory CD22-positive B cell precursor acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL). The indication further states that adult patients with Philadelphia chromosome positive (Ph+) relapsed or refractory B cell precursor ALL should have failed treatment with at least 1 tyrosine kinase inhibitor (TKI).
